blocks.headline: Extraordinary vocal music. Performed, commissioned, and preserved.
blocks.body: Staff & Ledger is a new professional vocal ensemble and publishing house dedicated to the music of our time. Founded by artists from Chanticleer, Volti, Clerestory, Aeternum, Byrd Ensemble, Fog City Singers, American Bach Soloists, and the San Francisco Symphony Chorus.
blocks.imageAlt: A dark rehearsal room with warm light on music stands and score folios.

items.title: Perform
items.body: Intimate concerts. New music. World premieres.

items.title: Publish
items.body: Beautiful editions. Thoughtful scores. Built to last.

blocks.text: We believe the choral composer's instrument is people.
blocks.accent: We exist to help great music travel.
